history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body mirror selfie taken inside a modern, dimly lit gym. The subject, a young man wearing a grey tank top, black sweatpants, a white baseball cap, and white sneakers, stands in the center of the frame, holding his phone to take the photo. He has a lean physique.

The gym's interior is sleek and contemporary, with a dominant color palette of black, white, and grey, accented by yellow and orange in the background artwork. To the left, a rack of dumbbells is visible, along with chairs and a small table in a lounge area. A large abstract mural with figures in motion, featuring vibrant yellow and orange hues, adorns the wall behind the weights.

The right side of the image shows more of the gym's interior reflected in a large, floor-to-ceiling mirror. A motivational quote is illuminated in bright yellow neon lights against a dark background, with the text "THE BODY ACHIEVES WHAT THE MIND BELIEVES" partially visible. The floor has a distinctive pattern of white lines on a dark surface, possibly indicating a training area.

The lighting is moody and atmospheric, with spotlights on the ceiling and the neon sign providing the main illumination. The overall mood is one of focus, determination, and modern fitness aesthetics. The style is realistic, capturing the details of the gym and the subject's attire.
